text:
J1100C_SOB_LYG_CD J1100C Shortness of Breath When Lying Flat Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had shortness of breath when lying flat. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
353 J1100Z_NO_SOB_CD J1100Z_NO_SOB_CD J1100Z None of Above Shortness of Breath Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates that the resident had none of the above. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
354 J1300_TOBCO_CD J1300_TOBCO_CD
